gaps: No existing test case covers call state detection for Morpheus devices
No existing test case covers DFU blocking during active calls
No existing test case covers ANC transparency mode control during active calls
No existing test case covers deckardId 0x0E35 or 0x0E22 for call state detection
No existing test case covers in-call status reporting for any device type

generated_testcases.title: Morpheus device reports in-call status via deckardId 0x0E35 during active call
steps: Connect a Morpheus device to the test system
Establish an active call on the Morpheus device
Query the call state using deckardId 0x0E35
Verify the returned status indicates an active call (e.g., 'in-call' = true)
End the active call
Query the call state again using deckardId 0x0E35
Verify the returned status indicates no active call (e.g., 'in-call' = false)
generated_testcases.expected: Morpheus device correctly reports in-call status via deckardId 0x0E35, returning active call state during a call and idle state after call ends.

generated_testcases.title: Morpheus device reports in-call status via deckardId 0x0E22 during active call
steps: Connect a Morpheus device to the test system
Establish an active call on the Morpheus device
Query the call state using deckardId 0x0E22
Verify the returned status indicates an active call (e.g., 'in-call' = true)
End the active call
Query the call state again using deckardId 0x0E22
Verify the returned status indicates no active call (e.g., 'in-call' = false)
generated_testcases.expected: Morpheus device correctly reports in-call status via deckardId 0x0E22, returning active call state during a call and idle state after call ends.

generated_testcases.title: DFU is blocked on Morpheus device during active call
steps: Connect a Morpheus device to the test system
Establish an active call on the Morpheus device
Attempt to initiate DFU (Device Firmware Update) on the Morpheus device
Verify that the DFU process is blocked/rejected with an appropriate error or status code
End the active call
Attempt to initiate DFU again
Verify that DFU proceeds normally after the call ends
generated_testcases.expected: DFU is blocked on Morpheus device during an active call, and allowed after the call ends.

generated_testcases.title: ANC transparency mode is disabled on Morpheus device during active call
steps: Connect a Morpheus device to the test system
Enable ANC transparency mode on the Morpheus device
Verify ANC transparency mode is active
Establish an active call on the Morpheus device
Check the ANC transparency mode status
Verify that ANC transparency mode is automatically disabled/turned off during the active call
End the active call
Check the ANC transparency mode status again
Verify that ANC transparency mode can be re-enabled after the call ends
generated_testcases.expected: ANC transparency mode is automatically disabled on Morpheus device during an active call and can be re-enabled after the call ends.

generated_testcases.title: Morpheus device reports in-call status via deckardId 0x0E35 triggers DFU blocking
steps: Connect a Morpheus device to the test system
Establish an active call on the Morpheus device
Query the call state using deckardId 0x0E35 and confirm 'in-call' = true
Attempt to initiate DFU on the Morpheus device
Verify that DFU is blocked/rejected
End the active call
Query the call state using deckardId 0x0E35 and confirm 'in-call' = false
Attempt to initiate DFU again
Verify that DFU proceeds normally
generated_testcases.expected: In-call status reported via deckardId 0x0E35 correctly triggers DFU blocking during active calls, and DFU is allowed after call ends.

generated_testcases.title: Morpheus device reports in-call status via deckardId 0x0E35 triggers ANC transparency mode control
steps: Connect a Morpheus device to the test system
Enable ANC transparency mode on the Morpheus device
Verify ANC transparency mode is active
Establish an active call on the Morpheus device
Query the call state using deckardId 0x0E35 and confirm 'in-call' = true
Check the ANC transparency mode status
Verify that ANC transparency mode is automatically disabled during the active call
End the active call
Query the call state using deckardId 0x0E35 and confirm 'in-call' = false
Re-enable ANC transparency mode
Verify that ANC transparency mode can be enabled after the call ends
generated_testcases.expected: In-call status reported via deckardId 0x0E35 correctly triggers ANC transparency mode to be disabled during active calls, and re-enabled after call ends.

generated_testcases.title: Morpheus device reports in-call status via deckardId 0x0E22 triggers DFU blocking
steps: Connect a Morpheus device to the test system
Establish an active call on the Morpheus device
Query the call state using deckardId 0x0E22 and confirm 'in-call' = true
Attempt to initiate DFU on the Morpheus device
Verify that DFU is blocked/rejected
End the active call
Query the call state using deckardId 0x0E22 and confirm 'in-call' = false
Attempt to initiate DFU again
Verify that DFU proceeds normally
generated_testcases.expected: In-call status reported via deckardId 0x0E22 correctly triggers DFU blocking during active calls, and DFU is allowed after call ends.

generated_testcases.title: Morpheus device reports in-call status via deckardId 0x0E22 triggers ANC transparency mode control
steps: Connect a Morpheus device to the test system
Enable ANC transparency mode on the Morpheus device
Verify ANC transparency mode is active
Establish an active call on the Morpheus device
Query the call state using deckardId 0x0E22 and confirm 'in-call' = true
Check the ANC transparency mode status
Verify that ANC transparency mode is automatically disabled during the active call
End the active call
Query the call state using deckardId 0x0E22 and confirm 'in-call' = false
Re-enable ANC transparency mode
Verify that ANC transparency mode can be enabled after the call ends
generated_testcases.expected: In-call status reported via deckardId 0x0E22 correctly triggers ANC transparency mode to be disabled during active calls, and re-enabled after call ends.

generated_testcases.title: Morpheus device reports idle state via deckardId 0x0E35 when no call is active
steps: Connect a Morpheus device to the test system with no active call
Query the call state using deckardId 0x0E35
Verify the returned status indicates no active call (e.g., 'in-call' = false)
Attempt to initiate DFU
Verify that DFU proceeds normally (not blocked)
Enable ANC transparency mode
Verify that ANC transparency mode can be enabled successfully
generated_testcases.expected: Morpheus device correctly reports idle state via deckardId 0x0E35 when no call is active, allowing DFU and ANC transparency mode.

generated_testcases.title: Morpheus device reports idle state via deckardId 0x0E22 when no call is active
steps: Connect a Morpheus device to the test system with no active call
Query the call state using deckardId 0x0E22
Verify the returned status indicates no active call (e.g., 'in-call' = false)
Attempt to initiate DFU
Verify that DFU proceeds normally (not blocked)
Enable ANC transparency mode
Verify that ANC transparency mode can be enabled successfully
generated_testcases.expected: Morpheus device correctly reports idle state via deckardId 0x0E22 when no call is active, allowing DFU and ANC transparency mode.
